page_content:
Prerequisite: MIEH600.

Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.

MIEH789 Independent Study (1-6 Credits)

Individual reading and/or research under a specific faculty member in the department.

Prerequisite: Permission of SPHL-Maryland Institute for Applied Environmental Health.

MIEH799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) MIEH899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)
